title: Verify Cancellation Flow when Incentive is Disabled from Backend
description: Test the cancellation flow to ensure it gracefully handles the scenario where the discount offer is turned off.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the experiment cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is DISABLED in the backend.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The incentive offer pop-up is NOT displayed. The flow proceeds directly to trial cancellation, and the feedback pop-up appears immediately.
